query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A view of a multi-arched stone bridge crossing a calm river, flanked by leafless trees and a historic building with chimneys on the left bank. Dense fog obscures the background, rendering the sun as a faint disc in the sky, while the water below reflects the bridge and surrounding vegetation. The entire landscape is cast in a uniform yellow-amber monochrome.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A fog-choked landscape rendered in a muted, faded yellow-amber palette with oppressive low contrast, evoking atmospheric distress and unease. A multi-arched stone bridge crosses a still river, flanked by bare-branched trees and a historic building with chimneys, all flattened by diffused light and suffocating mist. The sun appears as a pale, washed-out disc through the haze, while the heavily muted tones and compressed tonal range create a melancholic, foreboding mood.
